scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && pip install --break-system-packages -r api/requirements.txt && export PYTHONPATH=$PYTHONPATH:$(pwd)/backend && python backend/manage.py collectstatic --noinput && cp -a backend/staticfiles_build/static/. frontend/dist/static/
scripts.install-deps: npm install && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install
